lines.speaker: Master Chef
lines.text: Time for you to learn the fine art of cooking bread.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about making dough again.

lines.speaker: Master Chef
lines.text: It's quite simple. Just use a pot of flour on a bucket of water, or vice versa, and you'll make dough. You can fill a bucket with water at any sink.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about range cooking again.

lines.speaker: Master Chef
lines.text: The range is the only place you can cook a lot of the more complex foods in Gielinor. To cook on a range, all you need to do is click on it. You'll need to make sure you have the required items in your inventory though.

lines.speaker: Master Chef
lines.text: Ah! Welcome, newcomer. I am the Master Chef, Lev. It is here that I will teach you how to cook food truly fit for a king.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I already know how to cook. Brynna taught me just now.

lines.speaker: Master Chef
lines.text: Hahahahahaha! You call THAT cooking? Some shrimp on an open log fire? Oh, no, no, no. I am going to teach you the fine art of cooking bread.
